exit_criteria.description: I CANNOT declare a task complete until ALL these criteria are met
exit_criteria.criterion: Evidence collected with [VERIFIED] markers from real files
Confidence level explicitly declared (greater than 60% for recommendations)
All assertions verified against real code (not assumed)

on_criteria_not_met.action: Specify what additional investigation is needed

check.question: Did I READ real files or am I assuming?
check.if_assuming: Use Read tool first. For code searches: use LSP (lsp_find_references, lsp_workspace_symbols). For text searches: use Grep (docs/configs only, never code).

check.question: Would the skill `verify-claims` agent question this?
check.if_yes: Add evidence or qualify the assertion

check.question: Did I verify that file paths exist?
Am I declaring success without running verification?

pre_response_validation.rule: If ANY answer reveals a gap - investigate before responding

on_max_reached.action: Transfer to orchestrator with partial findings
Recommend next steps or alternative approaches

escalation_triggers.trigger: Required file/resource not found after search

confidence_markers.marker: Directly confirmed in code with file:line
Searched but could not locate evidence
